---
title: "transit_test"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-02-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=F, warning=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
install.packages("tidytuesdayR")
install.packages("tidyverse")
require(ggplot2)
require(stringi)
require(tidyr)
require(dplyr)
```

## Getting the data

```{r}
# Getting the Data
transit_cost_2 <- read.csv("transit-1-16-2026.csv")
gdp_data <- read.csv("world-bank-gdp.csv")
country_code <- read.csv("country-code.csv")
urban <- read.csv("urban-pop.csv")
fed <- read.csv("FEDFUNDS.csv")
```

## Cleaning

```{r}
transit2 <- transit_cost_2[1:1007,c("Country", "City", "Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")]

cols <- c("Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year",  "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")
for(col in cols){
  transit2[,col] <- as.numeric(transit2[,col])
}

transit2$Years <- transit2$End.year - transit2$Start.year
transit2$real_cost <- transit2$Cost.km..2023.dollars. * transit2$Length

transit2
```


## Continent

```{r}
transit2 <- transit2 %>%
  mutate(
    Continent = case_when(
      Country %in% c("US", "CA", "MX", "PA") ~ "North America",
      Country %in% c("BR", "AR", "CL", "CO", "PE", "EC") ~ "South America",
      Country %in% c("GB", "FR", "DE", "ES", "IT", "NL", "NO",
                     "SE", "DK", "FI", "AT", "BE", "BG",
                     "CZ", "GR", "HU", "CH", "RU") ~ "Europe",
      Country %in% c("CN", "JP", "KR", "IN", "HK", "ID",
                     "IL", "IR", "MY", "BD", "TH", "AE",
                     "BH", "KW") ~ "Asia",
      Country %in% c("AU", "NZ") ~ "Oceania",
      Country %in% c("EG", "ZA") ~ "Africa",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Continent = as.factor(Continent)
  )

transit2
```

## Exploratory plots/statistics

### Year
```{r}
ggplot(transit2) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x=Start.year, color='Start Year'),binwidth=1) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Year") +
  ylab("Number of Projects") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects Starting and Ending Each Year") +
  geom_histogram(aes(x=End.year, color='End Year'), binwidth=1)
```
###Cost-km
```{r}
ggplot(transit2, aes(x=Cost.km..2023.dollars.)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=50, color='black') +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Cost/km (millions of 2023 dollars)") +
  ylab("Number of Projects") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects vs. Cost/km")
```

```{r}
ggplot(transit2, aes(x=Length)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=5, color='black') +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Length (km)") +
  ylab("Number of Projects") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects vs. Length (km)")

```


## GDP

```{r}
country_name_to_code <- function(name){
  country_code[country_code$Name==name,]$Code
}

country_code_to_gdp <- function(code, year){
  ifelse(!(year %in% 1960:2025),
         NA,
         gdp_data[gdp_data$CC==code, paste("X",year, sep="")])
}

gdp_data$CC <- sapply(gdp_data$Country.Name, FUN=country_name_to_code)
gdp_data$CC <- as.character(gdp_data$CC)


gdp <- c()
for(i in 1:nrow(transit2)){
  row <- transit2[i,c("Country","Year")]
  gdp <- c(gdp, country_code_to_gdp(row[[1]],row[[2]]))
}
transit2$gdp <- gdp
gdp_data$Country.Name

unique(gdp_data$Country.Name)
```

### Removing NAs
```{r}
for (yr in 1960:2025){
transit2[transit2$Country=="RU"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Russian Federation", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="TR"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Turkiye", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="US"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="United States", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="KR"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Korea, Rep.", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="HK"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Hong Kong SAR, China", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="UK"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="United Kingdom", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="SA"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="South Africa", paste("X",yr,sep="")]

transit2[transit2$Country=="TH"&transit2$Year==yr,"gdp"] <- gdp_data[gdp_data$Country.Name=="Thailand", paste("X",yr,sep="")]
}

cy <- transit2[is.na(transit2$gdp),c("Country", "Year")]
cyg <- group_by(.data=cy, cy$Country) 
s <- summarise(cyg,
          n=n())
s
sum(s$n)

sum(is.na(transit2$gdp) & transit2$Year == 2025)
```

##Urban pop

```{r}
code_to_urban <- function(code, year){
  ifelse(!(year %in% 1960:2025),
         NA,
         urban[urban$CC==code, paste("X",year, sep="")])
}

urban$CC <- sapply(urban$Country.Name, FUN=country_name_to_code)
urban$CC <- as.character(urban$CC)


urb <- c()
for(i in 1:nrow(transit2)){
  row <- transit2[i,c("Country","Year")]
  urb <- c(urb, code_to_urban(row[[1]],row[[2]]))
}
transit2$urban_pop <- urb

```

## FED
```{r}
fed$year <- substr(fed$observation_date, 1, 4)

for(yr in 1954:2026){
  if(yr %in% transit2$Year){
  fed[fed$year==yr,"int"] <- mean(fed[fed$year==yr,"FEDFUNDS"])}
}

year_to_rate <- function(yr){
  fed[fed$year==yr, "int"]
}

transit2$fed <- 0

```



## Overall Cost

```{r}

cost <- lm(data=transit2, real_cost ~ Stations + gdp + RR.)
summary(cost)

cost_sq <- lm(data=transit2, sqrt(real_cost) ~ Stations + gdp + RR.)
summary(cost_sq)

plot(cost)
plot(cost_2g)

BIC(cost)
BIC(cost_sq)

AIC(cost)
AIC(cost_sq)

summary(cost)$adj.r.squared
summary(cost_sq)$adj.r.squared

```
```{r}
plot(cost_2)

# 7*10^6/10^13  / $1
$ 7/10^7 / $1
# per dollar of gdp, we expect the construction cost to go up by 7 10-millionths of a dollar
```

```{r}
transit2[is.na(transit2$gdp) & transit2$Year > 2023,c("Country","Year")]

transit2$Year > 2023
```

```{r}
1-(17/5000)/(49/5000)
```
